reviews.review_description: Only thing I would want to change is horror to be more scary but good game moderators nice even the forest has nice music and the whole game 50/10 definitely recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you for your rating! We are currently working on making horror even more scary so everyone can have a thrilling time with their friends!

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing because where fat and I got mod so I can help you guys AMAZING GAME😁

Trust me, this game is insane horror. It’s a little bit scary The characters have very unique styles, including fatness. If you do run into this guy cold snowy, he is a fantastic big bob.
Purp Anarrator are very cool moderators overall I think this game is a fun game to play. Go ahead and download it.

developer_response.body: We agree over here at the Big Bob tag Team!

reviews.review_description: This is the best fan game I love the community and the moderators they are so nice get this game now!!!
This game is awsome great owners/moderators and community the physics just like gtag and horror is actully a little bit scary best fan game ever.
